overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through an arid desert landscape with Joshua trees and large rock formations during golden hour. The character follows a dirt trail, reaches a railroad crossing, walks along the tracks, and crosses to the other side before continuing into the desert.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding dirt path through arid desert terrain toward large rock formations in the distance

entered.detail: massive reddish-brown rock outcrop dominating the horizon ahead
tall yucca tree with spiky leaves silhouetted against the sky
desert tree with branching arms and green foliage
sandy brown path winding through dry grass and scrub
distant hazy mountains forming the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a desert dirt trail surrounded by sparse Joshua trees and dry vegetation. Large rock formations rise prominently in the distance ahead, bathed in warm golden hour light. The landscape is wide open with clear skies and no other characters or vehicles in sight.

events.description: character reaches the railroad tracks and turns left to walk alongside them
character steps over the railroad tracks to cross to the other side

agents.ego_description: turning left at the railroad tracks, walking parallel to them briefly, then crossing over the rails to the other side

entered.detail: parallel steel rails with wooden ties embedded in gravel bed
crushed stone ballast surrounding the railroad tracks
tall thin metal structure silhouetted against the sky on a distant hill

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a railroad crossing in the desert, turning left to walk alongside the tracks. The ground changes to gravel ballast as the character navigates the rails. A distant radio tower becomes visible on the left horizon while the large rock formation shifts to the right side of the frame.

events.description: character turns right away from railroad tracks and continues on dirt path

agents.ego_description: turning right to walk away from the railroad tracks along a new dirt trail toward distant formations

notable_agents.action: distant figure or rider visible on the path ahead, barely discernible at the edge of visibility

entered.detail: small silhouette of a person or horse rider visible on the distant trail

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the railroad, the character turns right onto another dirt trail leading away from the tracks. The large rock formation now appears on the left side while the railroad recedes into the background. A distant figure becomes visible far ahead on the path, and the terrain continues as sparse desert with scattered Joshua trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an arid desert landscape that transitions from an open trail to a railroad crossing and back into the wilderness. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path surrounded by sparse Joshua trees, moving toward massive rock formations bathed in warm golden hour light. As the character reaches a railroad crossing, the camera shifts left to follow the gravel ballast of the tracks, bringing a distant radio tower into view while the rock formations slide to the right of the frame. The scene then opens up as the character turns right onto a new dirt trail, leaving the railroad behind and causing the rock formations to shift back to the left. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the scattered desert vegetation toward a distant figure appearing on the horizon.
